title: [ImportVerilog] Fix unbased unsized literals of packed aggregate type

features.name: unbased_unsized_literal_to_packed_struct_assignment
features.description: Code should include an unbased unsized literal ('0, '1, 'x, or 'z) assigned to a packed struct variable
features.snippet:
typedef struct packed { logic [7:0] a; logic b; } my_struct_t;
my_struct_t s = '0;

features.name: unbased_unsized_literal_initialization_of_packed_struct
features.description: Code should include an unbased unsized literal ('0, '1, 'x, or 'z) used to initialize a packed struct at declaration
features.snippet: struct packed { logic [7:0] a; logic b; } s = '0;
